title: Open the ACB System Statistics Screen and Review Displayed Metrics
summary: Navigate from the ACB System screen to the ACB System Statistics screen and review the statistical information displayed there, including robot faults, system faults, cycle time, and tipping station bag counts.
when_to_use: Use this procedure when an operator needs to access the ACB System Statistics screen from the ACB System screen and review the displayed ACB statistical information.

responsibilities: Navigate to the ACB System screen
Press STATISTICS to open the ACB System Statistics screen
Review the displayed robot faults, system faults, cycle time, and tipping station bag counts

safety_notes: This procedure is limited to HMI navigation and review of displayed information.
Do not assume acceptable numeric ranges or interpretations for displayed values; the source only states which metrics are shown.
access_or_tools_needed: STATISTICS control on the ACB System screen

system_preconditions: The ACB System screen is available
The STATISTICS control is available on the ACB System screen

visual_references.description: ACB System Statistics screen showing the statistical information available after pressing STATISTICS on the ACB System screen.
Reference legend related to the ACB System screen.
Reference screen related to tipping station information categories mentioned in the candidate context.

steps.title: Go to the ACB System screen
steps.purpose: Reach the source screen from which the ACB System Statistics screen is accessed.
steps.instruction: Go to the "ACB System" screen on the HMI.
steps.expected_result: The ACB System screen is displayed.
steps.healthy_condition: The operator is on the ACB System screen and can access its controls.
steps.failure_condition: The ACB System screen is not available or cannot be reached.

actions.label: Open ACB System screen
actions.exact_action: Go to the "ACB System" screen on the HMI.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Reference information for the ACB System screen.

stop_or_escalate_if: The ACB System screen cannot be accessed.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Press STATISTICS on the "ACB System" screen to access this screen.

steps.title: Press STATISTICS to open the statistics screen
steps.purpose: Open the ACB System Statistics screen from the ACB System screen.
steps.instruction: Press STATISTICS on the "ACB System" screen to access the ACB System Statistics screen.
steps.expected_result: The ACB System Statistics screen is displayed.
steps.healthy_condition: The ACB System Statistics screen opens after pressing STATISTICS.
steps.failure_condition: The STATISTICS control is not present or the ACB System Statistics screen does not open.

success_criteria: The ACB System Statistics screen is displayed.
The operator can view robot fault count, system fault count, cycle time, and tipping station bag counts.
healthy_conditions: STATISTICS is available on the ACB System screen.
The ACB System Statistics screen opens successfully.
The screen displays robot faults, system faults, cycle time, and tipping station bag counts.
failure_conditions: The ACB System screen does not provide the STATISTICS control described by the source.
The ACB System Statistics screen does not display the documented statistical information.
One or more expected metrics are not visible on the screen.
escalation_guidance: Escalate if the ACB System screen does not provide the STATISTICS control described by the source.
Escalate if the ACB System Statistics screen does not display the documented statistical information.

The source does not provide a time estimate for completing this procedure.
